name.description: Prompt template file name without .md. Use letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, or hyphens; it is normalized to lowercase hyphen form.
name.x-prompt: What prompt template would you like to create?

project.x-prompt: Which Pi package project should receive this prompt template?

description.description: Prompt template description shown in autocomplete.

argumentHint.description: Optional argument hint shown in autocomplete, for example "<PR-URL>" or "[instructions]".
